title: NoRecipeBook
description: A Fabric/Quilt mod that removes the recipe button from the players inventory
body:
## 📗 About A Fabric/Quilt mod that removes the recipe book from the players inventory. Available for all Minecraft versions! ## 🖼️ Showcase Vanilla Minecraft | With this Mod ----------------- | -------------- ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TvL1V8O5/images/954ce86422641cd42c5540c91ca6a2a80c55e875.png) | ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TvL1V8O5/images/5bdf095e0f5c5c66a337790d7f3ac336dc624e16.png) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TvL1V8O5/images/2215eaede2e34eb4b828e845ceba2b55b1f870b8.png) | ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TvL1V8O5/images/5c0a10a8ce1a095e446e407670f54d9a18868f07.png)
## 🐸 Compatibility **Quilt:** This mod is primarily developed for the Fabric loader. Since it only uses Mixins, there should be no issues using it with Quilt loader. **NeoForge:** For Forge and NeoForge, there are already existing mods that offer similar functionality. ## 🐞 Bugs and Issues Please report any bugs or issues you find on [GitHub](https://github.com/Grayray75/NoRecipeBook/issues).
